# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false" # Disable mesh policy injection for these services that need direct network access without proxy overhead
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: gcr.io/google-samples/gb-frontend:v4
        name: web

         output_encoding: base64
       - repo: local
         hooks:
+          - id: fix-crlf
+            name: Fix CR+LF line endings in the YAML files generated by gitpod.io
+            entry: docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_TOKEN=1 -v ~/.gitpod:/workspace -w /workspace ghcr.io/googlecloudplatform/click-to-deploy/gitpod-pre-commit-hook:0.3 bash -c "/workspace/.gitpod-helpers/fix-crlf.sh"
+          - id: fix-trailing-whitespace
+            name: Fix trailing whitespace in YAML files generated by gitpod.io
+            entry: docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_TOKEN=1 -v ~/.gitpod:/workspace -w /workspace ghcr.io/googlecloudplatform/click-to-deploy/gitpod-pre-commit-hook:0.3 bash -c "/workspace/.gitpod-helpers/fix-trailing-whitespace.sh"

   verify-manifests-in-repo:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/${{ github.repository_owner }}/click-to-deploy.git
+          cd click-to-deploy/.gitpod.d/workspace/manifests/tests/helloworld-from-yaml-file
+          mkdir -p /tmp/test
+          kubectl apply -f ./ | tee /tmp/test/kubectl.out

           - 'git-crypt diff'
         output_encoding: base64
       - repo: local
         hooks:
+          - id: fix-crlf
+            name: Fix CR+LF line endings in the YAML files generated by gitpod.io
+            entry: docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_TOKEN=1 -v ~/.gitpod:/workspace -w /workspace ghcr.io/googlecloudplatform/click-to-deploy/gitpod-pre-commit-hook:0.3 bash -c "/workspace/.gitpod-helpers/fix-crlf.sh"

+            entry: docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_TOKEN=1 -v ~/.gitpod:/workspace -w /workspace ghcr.io/googlecloudplatform/click-to-deploy/gitpod-pre-commit-hook:0.3 bash -c "/workspace/.gitpod-helpers/fix-trailing-whitespace.sh"

       - id: verify-yaml
         name: Check if generated YAML files contains only a single top level document
+        entry: docker run --rm -v /tmp:/workspace -w /workspace ghcr.io/googlecloudplatform/click-to-deploy/gitpod-pre-commit-hook:0.3 bash verify_yaml
         language: system
         pass_filenames: false # Do not change this value. It is used to detect files that failed yaml validation
+        args: ['{{ if or (or (ne .ci false) (eq $CI true)) (in $FILES 'manifests/*') (not has_file $DIR/requirements.yaml) (eq $MANUAL false)}'] --output=check-valid --ignore-compact {{ else }}{{ end }}']
       - id: detect-new-manually-added-lines
         name: Detect new manually added lines
+        entry: docker run --rm -v /tmp:/workspace -w /workspace ghcr.io/googlecloudplatform/click-to-deploy/gitpod-pre-commit-hook:0.3 bash detect_new_manually_added_lines
